author: KnockBox
name: KnockBox Game Plugin
description: A project template for creating KnockBox party game plugins with a dev host and tests.

routeIdentifier.description: URL-safe route identifier for the game (e.g., 'trivia-blitz'). NOTE for template maintainers: 'replaces' substitutes EVERY literal occurrence of 'my-game' across the template tree (including XML-doc examples). Do not introduce illustrative 'my-game' strings that should remain literal after scaffolding.
